summary: Presentation/front-end screens: Kronos Digital logo, Digital Element, title/attract menu, single-player win path, win result screen, The End, intro 'presents', match demo sequence.

functions.name: present_set_screen
functions.summary: Save previous screen ID, set new screen. Called from present.c, match.c, pregame.c.

functions.name: attract_blink_cb
functions.summary: Blink animation for menu item selection: frameCounter cycles between 0 and x_0f4167b4[6]*20, then returns to present_title_task.

functions.name: attract_menu_input
functions.summary: Handle attract menu input: case 0=rematch, 1=char select, 2=options, 3=main menu. D-pad up/down cycles between 4 options with 15-frame debounce.

functions.name: present_single_win
functions.summary: Single-player win: transition to match, set P1/P2 characters and sides.

functions.name: present_attract_cycle
functions.summary: Advance attract cycle: pick next character pair from sCharRotTable, set screen to character demo.

functions.name: present_title_task
functions.summary: Main title/attract menu task. Polls both controllers, routes to attract_menu_input. 2400-frame timeout → attract cycle.

functions.name: present_attract_loop
functions.summary: Attract demo loop: press start → load title.k2 → present_title_task. 900-frame timeout → attract cycle.

functions.name: present_skip_to_attract
functions.summary: Skip to attract mode on start button (used during titling/kronos sequences).

functions.name: present_digi_element
functions.summary: Display 'Digital Element' for 180 frames, then transition to menu (x_3dba3c6c).

functions.name: present_kronos_fade_out
functions.summary: Kronos logo fade-out: alpha -8 per frame, render black quad via tr_quad_xlu. When alpha < threshold → present_digi_element.

functions.name: present_kronos_fade_in
functions.summary: Kronos logo fade-in: alpha +8 per frame, load 'kronos' wad, then → present_kronos_fade_out.

functions.name: present_kronos_logo
functions.summary: Kronos Digital Entertainment logo sequence: wait 180 frames, then fade-in → fade-out.

functions.name: present_title_open_anim
functions.summary: Title opening animation: SFX at specific frames per sTitleSfxFrameTbl, when animation ends → create fade task.

functions.name: present_title_sfx
functions.summary: Title BGM trigger: play sfx 0x2000:8, mark object dead.

functions.name: present_title_open
functions.summary: Title open sequence: haze models + logo fade-in every 4 frames, when done → load 'titopen.k2' → present_title_open_anim.

functions.name: present_haze_anim
functions.summary: Haze effect: oscillate frameCounter 0..118 (idle animation loop).

functions.name: present_haze_init
functions.summary: Load haze models ('haze.k2', 'haze1.k2'), create objects with alpha=75. Also creates present_title_sfx task.

functions.name: present_theend_skip
functions.summary: The End screen: press start on winner side → transition to next screen (x_a3a32a2b).

functions.name: present_theend_anim_end
functions.summary: The End: animation complete → task_remove_current (cleanup).

functions.name: present_theend_init
functions.summary: The End: initial delay, then load 'theend.k2' model, switch to present_theend_skip.

functions.name: present_transition_screen
functions.summary: Transition to next screen based on gCurrentScreenId: boot → title, title → theend, credits → char select, default → theend.

functions.name: present_win_fade_out
functions.summary: Win result fade-out: alpha -6 per frame, Z offset, when done → present_transition_screen.

functions.name: present_win_result_loop
functions.summary: Win result main loop: decrement HP counter, when 0 → fade out (or transition). Start button → skip.

functions.name: present_winner_wait
functions.summary: Wait for winner model to be ready: poll x_50771dcd[0], then cam_ko_init.

functions.name: present_result_timer
functions.summary: Result screen countdown: decrement x_0f4167b4[0], when < 0 → transition.

functions.name: present_intro_presents
functions.summary: Intro 'Kronos Presents': SFX table per sPresentsSfxTbl, load 'demispk' wad at frame 260. Wait for demo anim end.

functions.name: present_demo_action
functions.summary: Match demo: character action SFX per sDemoSfxTbl, dust line spawns per sDemoDustFrameTbl, projectile spawn at frame 278.

functions.name: present_demo_sfx
functions.summary: Match demo SFX: per-character timing tables (sDemoCharSfxTbl for normal chars, sDemoBossSfxTbl for boss x_968cc9a2).

globals.name: sCharRotTable
globals.summary: Character rotation table for attract mode: [prev_winner][prev_loser] pairs for 8 stages

globals.name: sAttractCycleIdx
globals.summary: Attract mode cycle index, incremented per present_attract_cycle call

globals.name: sFadeQuadVtx
globals.summary: Full-screen black quad vertices for fade transitions (2 framebuffers × 4 verts)

globals.name: sTitleSfxFrameTbl
globals.summary: Frame numbers for title opening SFX triggers (14, 28, 40, ..., 100)

globals.name: sPresentsSfxTbl
globals.summary: SFX timing table for intro 'presents' sequence (231, 281, 297, ..., 0)}

globals.name: sDemoSfxTbl
globals.summary: SFX timing table for match demo (166, 194, 214, ..., 0)

globals.name: sDemoDustFrameTbl
globals.summary: Frame numbers for dust line spawn in match demo (175, 180, ..., 0)

globals.name: sDemoCharSfxTbl
globals.summary: SFX timing table for normal character in match demo

globals.name: sDemoBossSfxTbl
globals.summary: SFX timing table for boss character (x_968cc9a2) in match demo

types.name: PresentSfxEntry
types.summary: { s16 frame, s16 sfxId } pairs for SFX timing tables, terminated by { 0, 0 }

subsystems: Kronos logo: fade-in → 180 frame hold → fade-out → Digital Element → menu
Attract menu: 4 options (rematch, char select, options, main menu) with d-pad cycling + blink
Title screen: haze + character fade-in, 'titopen.k2' animation with timed SFX
Win result: HP counter decrement → fade out → transition to next screen
The End: model display + start skip
Match demo: character action with timed dust/projectile/SFX
Intro: 'Kronos Presents' with SFX triggers + 'demispk' wad load
open_questions: What are the exact screen IDs (x_e483bf48, x_96f25e0a, x_79c2dc5b, etc.)?
